title: local-signing backend absent from umbrella crate — no URI dispatch
description: secretx-local-signing is in the workspace and documented in README but is NOT a dependency of secretx/ and has no feature flag or dispatch entry. Users enabling a hypothetical 'local-signing' feature on the umbrella crate will get a compile error. Broader issue: the umbrella has no from_signing_uri, so all SigningBackend users must import backend crates directly. The README claim 'call sites are identical regardless of which HSM' is true for method calls but not for crate imports — users can't swap signing backends by changing a URI and a feature flag.
